name: Baskets
notes: Selected four times in a single OnPost request: once in SetBasketModelAsync (view load), once in SetQuantities, once in CreateOrderAsync, once in DeleteBasketAsync — the Spring Boot port should consolidate with a single basket fetch where possible.
Deleted after order creation completes successfully; EF cascade propagates the delete to all associated BasketItems rows.

name: BasketItems
notes: Always loaded via .Include(b => b.Items) on every Baskets query — never queried independently.
Quantities updated by SetQuantities before order creation; items with Quantity=0 deleted by RemoveEmptyItems; all remaining rows cascade-deleted when the basket is deleted after order creation.

name: CatalogItems
notes: Read twice in OnPost: once in GetBasketItems (for display) and once in CreateOrderAsync to build CatalogItemOrdered snapshots — both fetch Id, Name, PictureUri via CatalogItemsSpecification.
CatalogItem.Price is NOT read at checkout — order line-item prices come from BasketItem.UnitPrice, which was set when the item was added to the basket.

name: Orders
notes: One row inserted per successful checkout; BuyerId is copied from Basket.BuyerId; OrderDate is set to DateTimeOffset.Now on construction.

ShipToAddress is an EF owned entity (Address value object) stored as ShipToAddress_* columns on the Orders table; the address is hardcoded as '123 Main St., Kent, OH, United States, 44240' — the Spring Boot rebuild must replace this with a real address input.

name: OrderItems
notes: One row inserted per basket item; CatalogItemOrdered is an EF owned entity stored as ItemOrdered_* columns — it is a point-in-time snapshot (name and picture URI at order time, not current catalog values).
UnitPrice and Units come from BasketItem.UnitPrice and BasketItem.Quantity respectively — prices are snapshotted at add-to-basket time, not at checkout time.
